description: The intake gate for the Product Bio Engine. The four required questions are asked ALL AT ONE TIME, in a single message block, BEFORE any bio is written (the source webhook normalized 7 fields but the IP consumes only these four — PRD §2.1/§3.3). Once answered, the locked intake (working/intake.json) is written against this contract and P0-INTAKE unlocks. prove_pb_intake.py enforces it fail-closed; a self-attested completeness flag is NEVER trusted. No interview fabrication — client words only.

delivery.rule: Emit the four required questions (plus the three optional ones) as ONE message-block turn. The four required fields are the only inputs the baked IP consumes.
delivery.front_door: any marketing/copywriting department role that needs a master-brain product bio (Command Center task ingest, a Skill 38 request, a direct operator ask)

questions.prompt: What is the exact product name (with any tagline or positioning statement)?
Describe the product: what it is, what it does, who it helps, and the transformation it delivers.
Founder / owner first name (used for the deliverable label and handoff).
Founder / owner last name (used for the deliverable label and handoff).
(Optional) A label for the deliverable folder. Defaults to the product slug + date.
(Optional) Contact email — captured for handoff parity only; the bio IP does not use it.
(Optional) Contact phone — captured for handoff parity only (dormant in the source LLM path).
